title: Thermosyphon cooler for an electric device with inductance
abstract: An electric device (10) having an electric inductance comprises at least one winding (12), a magnetic core (14) with a leg (18b) surrounded by the winding (12) and a thermosyphon cooler (16) for cooling the winding (12). The cooler (16) has an evaporator (22) with at least one evaporator conduit (28) for evaporating a cooling fluid and a condenser (24) with at least one condenser conduit (30) for condensing the cooling fluid. The evaporator (22) is in thermal contact with a side surface (27) of the winding (12). Furthermore, the evaporator conduit (28) and/or the condenser conduit (30) are provided by a multi-channel tube (52), which multi-channel tube (52) is separated by inner walls (54) in at least two channels (50).
claims:
Claims An electric device (10) having an electric inductance, the electric device (10) comprising: at least one winding (12); a magnetic core (14) with a leg (18b) surrounded by the winding (12); and a thermosyphon cooler (16) for cooling the winding (12); wherein the cooler (16) has an evaporator (22) with at least one evaporator conduit (28) for evaporating a cooling fluid and a condenser (24) with at least one condenser conduit (30) for condensing the cooling fluid; wherein the evaporator (22) is in thermal contact with a side surface (27) of the winding (12); and wherein the evaporator conduit (28) and/or the condenser conduit (30) are provided by a multi-channel tube (52), which multi-channel tube (52) is separated by inner walls (54) in at least two channels (50). The electric device (10) of claim 1 , wherein the side surface (27) faces towards the leg (18b) of the magnetic core (14) and the evaporator (22) is at least partially arranged between the winding (12) and the leg (18a). 3. The electric device (10) of claim 1 or 2, wherein the side surface (27) faces away from the leg (18b) of the magnetic core (14) and the evaporator (22) is at least partially arranged outside of the winding (12). 4. The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the evaporator (22) is additionally in thermal contact with the magnetic core (14). The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the winding (12) is received in the magnetic core (14) such that an end region (20) of the winding (12) extends out of the magnetic core (14); wherein the evaporator (22) is in thermal contact with the end region (20) of the winding (12). The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, 

 wherein the evaporator (22) comprises an evaporator plate (26) for providing the thermal contact between the at least one evaporator conduit (28) and the winding (12); wherein the evaporator conduit (28) is at least partially incorporated inside the evaporator plate (26). The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the condenser (24) is mounted above the evaporator (22) and/or extends above the winding (12) and/or above the magnetic core (16), such that the condenser (24) is coolable via an air flow. The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the condenser (24) comprises a plurality of condenser conduits (30) arranged in a row and/or the evaporator (22) comprises a plurality of evaporator conduits (28) arranged in a row. The electric device (10) of claim 8, wherein at least one manifold (32, 36, 38, 42) is provided between the evaporator (22) and the condenser (24) for collecting and/or distributing fluid between the plurality of evaporator conduits (28) and condenser conduits (30). The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein a return conduit (40) for guiding condensed cooling fluid from the condenser (24) to the evaporator (22) is arranged outside of an evaporator plate (26) of the evaporator (22). The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein a return conduit (40) for guiding condensed cooling fluid from the condenser (24) to the evaporator (22) is at least partially arranged inside an evaporator plate (26) of the evaporator (22). The electric device (10) of claim 1 , wherein at least one channel (50) of a multi-channel tube (52) provides the evaporator conduit (28) and at least one channel (50) of the same multi-channel tube (50) provides a return conduit (40) for guiding condensed cooling fluid from the condenser (24) to the evaporator (22). 

 The electric device (10) of claim 1 , wherein the evaporator conduit (28) is provided by a channel (50) of the multi-channel tube (52) and the condenser conduit (30) is provided by a channel (50) of the same multi-channel tube (52) ; and/or wherein a further channel (50) of the multi-channel tube (52) provides a return conduit (40) for guiding condensed cooling fluid from the condenser (24) to the evaporator (22). The electric device (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the condenser (24) comprises fins (48) arranged between condenser conduits (30).
